text_jp:
その光の力をも我が力になそうとし
誤ったため…いにしえの戦いに敗れた…{END}
text_en:
I tried to make even
that power of light my own,
and for that mistake…
I lost the ancient battle…{END}

text_jp: それが今や貧弱な人類に宿るだけの力…{END}
text_en:
And now it is merely a power
harbored by weak humans…{END}

text_jp: お前達が大げさに叫ぶ変身など…{END}
text_en:
That transformation
you shout so grandly…{END}
